optimize-interface-layer-clipping.name: Optimize Token UI Render Batching
optimize-interface-layer-clipping.hint: Optimizes render batching of the token UI by reordering draw calls for individual UI elements across token boundaries. Enable together with "Cache Token Resource Bars" and "token-effects-caching" for highest impact.

token-bars-caching.name: Cache Token Resource Bars
token-bars-caching.hint: Caches token resource bars to textures. Very minor visual degradation on high zoom levels possible.

token-effects-caching.name: Cache Token Effects
token-effects-caching.hint: Caches the token effects bar. Very minor visual degradation on high zoom levels possible.

precomputed-noise-textures.name: Optimize animated lights
precomputed-noise-textures.hint: Enable shader optimizations of certain animated lights (Bewitching Wave, Fairy Light, Ghostly Light, Smoke Patch, ...). Greatly improves performance for scenes with many animated lights.

reduce-lighting-resolution.name: Scale Lighting Effects Resolution
reduce-lighting-resolution.hint: Reduces the internal resolution of lighting effects to improve performance. V14 implements this approach for performance levels other than maximum, so activating this option in V14 only enables granular control for all lighting layers.

control-icon-caching.name: Cache Control Icons
control-icon-caching.hint: Caches control icons (notes, sounds, drawings) as bitmaps. Reduces them each to a single draw call that batches with all other icons, regardless of count.

mesh-geometry-fitting.name: Fit Token & Tile Mesh Geometry
mesh-geometry-fitting.hint: Fits the render geometry of tokens and tiles to a tight polygon that matches the visible (non-transparent) area of their texture. This reduces GPU overdraw for tokens and tiles with large transparent regions, particularly large circular token art. Skipped automatically for animated (video) tokens, tiles and under other special circumstances. Somewhat experimental.

wall-sprite-caching.name: Cache Wall Graphics as Sprites
wall-sprite-caching.hint: Optimizes drawing of wall UI segments by replacing the PIXI.Graphics objects with pre-baked sprites. Dramatically increases performance when the walls layer is active.

token-layer-cache.name: Cache Token UI Layer
token-layer-cache.hint: Renders all token UI elements (bars, nameplates, status effects, void meshes) to texture once per change, then applies the cached result every frame. Can greatly improve performance for scenes with many tokens.

ember-shader-optimizations.name: Optimize Ember Shaders
ember-shader-optimizations.hint: Optimizes shaders from the Ember module. Dramatically improves performance in the region map, world map and various other scenes.
ember-shader-optimizations.emberVersionWarning: Prime Performance and especially Ember shader optimizations are only tested with Ember version 0.5.1. Please DISABLE THIS MODULE before reporting any issues to the Ember team.

dnd5e-optimizations.name: Enable D&D 5e specific optimizations
dnd5e-optimizations.hint: Optimizes D&D 5e specific features. Replaces the Map Location note marker with an optimized version. Greatly improves performance in scenes with many Map Location notes.

disable-app-v2-background-blur.name: Disable background blur effects
disable-app-v2-background-blur.hint: Disables the background blur effects in the app v2 and all other UI elements. This can dramatically improve performance, especially on lower-end GPUs.

custom-render-scale.name: Lighting Effects Render Scale
custom-render-scale.label: Configure Render Scale
custom-render-scale.hint: Configure the render scale for lighting effects on the canvas. This can improve performance significantly, especially on lower-end GPUs. Visual impact ranges from unnoticeable to very noticeable, depending on the effects layer. Activate "Reduce resolution of lighting effects" for this configuration to work.

menu.title: Custom Render Scale
menu.label: Custom Render Scale
menu.description: Configure individual render scales for different lighting effects. The render scale is a multiplier for the internal resolution of the lighting effects. A value of 100 means 100% render scale, so no change. A value of 50 means the resolution is halved and so on.

background.label: Background
background.hint: Background effects render scale. High visual impact, minimal performance impact. Optimized default is 100%

illumination.label: Illumination
illumination.hint: Illumination effects render scale. Very low visual impact, medium performance impact. Optimized default is 40%

coloration.label: Coloration
coloration.hint: Coloration effects render scale. Medium to very high visual impact, depending on coloration technique. High performance impact. Optimized default is 100%.

darkness.label: Darkness
darkness.hint: Darkness effects render scale. Minimal visual impact, minimal performance impact. Optimized default is 50%
